name: star-citizen-interactive-map-starter
description: Star Citizen route and trade planner with compact optional example runs and accurate personal run counts

scripts.test: node tests/router.test.mjs && node tests/trade-calculator.test.mjs && node tests/community-trade-runs.test.mjs
scripts.validate: node --check src/app.js && node --check src/router.js && node --check src/map-hierarchy.js && node --check src/map-2d.js && node --check src/map-3d.js && node --check src/body-textures.js && node --check src/community-examples.js && node --check src/trade-calculator.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check scripts/update-universe-data.mjs && node --check scripts/update-trade-data.mjs
